title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller South Asia Partners:
PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners!
